revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with ''''Missing topics about Shinto''' ==Kami== *[[ama-tsu-kami]] - {{search|ama-tsu-kami}} *[[Ame no Minakanushi]], the first Shinto kami - {{search|Ame+no+Minaka...'
Removing [[:Category:Skysmith's list of missing articles]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2023 October 23#Category:Skysmith's list of missing articles]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[Shikinaisha]]" to "{{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|lt=Shikinaisha}}"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Skysmith%2FMissing_topics_about_Shinto here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Skysmith%2FMissing_topics_about_Shinto for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
'''Missing topics about Shinto'''

''Thanks to [[User:Immanuelle]]''

==Kami==
*[[Ama-tsu-kami]] - {{search|ama-tsu-kami}}
*[[:en:Ame no Minakanushi|Ame no Minakanushi]], the first Shinto kami - {{search|Ame no Minakanushi}}
*[[Awashima-sama]] - {{search|Awashima-sama}}
*[[Aze (kami)]], pine tree spirit - {{search|Aze}}
*[[Bimbogami]] - {{search|Bimbogami}}
*[[Chokata]], guardian spirit - {{search|Chokata}}
*[[Dozoku-shin]], kami-type - {{search|Dozoku-shin}}
*[[eight imperial tutelary deities]] - {{search|eight imperial tutelary deities}}
*[[gamiya-san]] - {{search|gamiya-san}}
*[[hi-no-kami]] - {{search|hi-no-kami}}
*[[Hiru-ko-no-kami]], [[hiru-ko-no-mikoto]] - {{search|Hiru-ko-no-kami}}
*[[Kagu-tsuchi|Homusubi]], kami of fire - {{search|Homusubi}}
*[[Hoso-no-Kami]] - {{search|Hoso-no-Kami}}
*[[Hoso-shin]], kami of smallbox - {{search|Hoso-shin}}
*[[Ikukui]], kami - {{search|Ikukui}}
*[[Ikutamayorihime]] - {{search|Ikutamayorihime}}
*[[Kami no kuni]] - {{search|Kami no kuni}}
*[[Kawaya no kami]] - {{search|Kawaya no kami}}
*[[Kaya-Nu-Hima]], goddess of herbs - {{search|Kaya-Nu-Hima}}
*[[Kunisatsuchi-no-Mikoto|Kunisatsuchi]] - {{search|Kunisatsuchi}}
*[[Magatsuhi-no-kami]] - {{search|Magatsuhi-no-kami}}
*[[Munetsuchi]] - {{search|Munetsuchi}}
*[[Naru-Kami]], [[Kami-Naru]] - {{search|Naru-Kami}}
*[[O-Ryu]], goddess of willow trees - {{search|O-Ryu}}
*[[Omodaru and Ayakashikone|Omotaru]] - {{search|Omotaru}}
*[[Ootonobe-no-Kami]], primordial goddess - {{search|Ootonobe-no-Kami}}
*[[Otomabe]] - {{search|Otomabe}}
*[[Otonochi]] - {{search|Otonochi}}
*[[Rafu-Sen]], goddess of plum blossom - {{search|Rafu-Sen}}
*[[Saw no kami]] - {{search|Saw no kami}}
*[[Shita-Teru-Hime]], heroine - {{search|Shita-Teru-Hime}}
*[[Suhijini-ni-kimi]], kami of settled sediments - {{search|Suhijini-ni-kimi}}
*[[Suichini]] - {{search|Suichini}}
*[[Syo-Hime]], legendary woman - {{search|Syo-Hime}}
*[[Take-mika-Zuchi-no-kami]] - {{search|Take-mika-Zuchi-no-kami}}
*[[Takehazuchi]] - {{search|Takehazuchi}}
*[[Takemizuchi]] - {{search|Takemizuchi}}
*[[Tamatori]] - {{search|Tamatori}}
*[[Tatsu-Hime]], kami - {{search|Tatsu-Hime}}
*[[Tenchi Kana no kami]] - {{search|Tenchi Kana no kami}}
*[[Toshitokujin]], kami - {{search|Toshitokujin}}
*[[Toyokunnu]] - {{search|Toyokunnu}}
*[[Tshukui]] - {{search|Tshukui}}
*[[Uichini]] - {{search|Uichini}}
*[[Ujigami-sai]] - {{search|Ujigami-sai}}
*[[umi no kami]] - {{search|umi no kami}}
*[[Uso-Dori]], kami of singing - {{search|Uso-Dori}}
*[[Yashikigami]], household kami - {{search|Yashikigami}}
*[[Yaya-Zakura]], cherry-tree goddess - {{search|Yaya-Zakura}}
*[[Yomotsukami]], kami of the Shinto underworld – {{search|Yomotsukami}}
*[[Zoka no kami]] – {{search|Zoka no kami}}

==Rituals==
*[[azuma-asobi]], dance - {{search|azuma-asobi}}
*[[Chakugi]] - {{search|Chakugi}}
*[[Hakamagi]] - {{search|Hakamagi}}
*[[Ireisai]], memorial service - {{search|Ireisai}}
*[[Izomu Taisha Jinzaisai]], Shinto religious festival – {{search|Izomu Taisha Jinzaisai}}
*[[Spiral Rice Planting of Sado]] - {{search|Spiral Rice Planting of Sado}}
*[[Tsu jichinjai]] - {{search|Tsu jichinjai}}

===Festivals===
*[[Agata-yo-matsuri]] - {{search|Agata-yo-matsuri}}
*[[age-uma-matsuri]] - {{search|age-uma-matsuri}}
*[[Aizan Summer Festival]] - {{search|Aizan Summer Festival}}
*[[Autumn Matsuri]] [[aki-matsuri]] - {{search|Autumn Matsuri}}
*[[Bidaka hibuse matsuri]] - {{search|Bidaka hibuse matsuri}}
*[[Bonito Fishing Festival of Kōzushima]] - {{search|Bonito Fishing Festival of Kōzushima}}
*[[Borokake matsuri]] - {{search|Borokake matsuri}}
*[[Chichibu Festival]] - {{search|Chichibu Festival}}
*[[Chichibu Yomatsuri]] - {{search|Chichibu Yomatsuri}}

*[[Chiryū Festival]] - {{search|Chiryū Festival}}
*[[Dosojin Matsuri]] - {{search|Dosojin Matsuri}}
*[[Farming Rituals of Aso]] - {{search|Farming Rituals of Aso}}
*[[Festival of Six Souls]] - {{search|Festival of Six Souls}}
*[[Fuji-no-yamabiraki]], festival    - {{search|Fuji-no-yamabiraki}}
*[[Funadama matsuri]] - {{search|Funadama matsuri}}
*[[Furukawa Festival]] - {{search|Furukawa Festival}}
*[[Fuyu matsuri]] - {{search|Fuyu matsuri}}
*[[Fuyu no matsuri]] - {{search|Fuyu no matsuri}}
*[[Gohan matsuri]] - {{search|Gohan matsuri}}
*[[Hama-ori]], festival - {{search|Hama-ori}}
*[[Hana Matsuri]] [[Hana-matsuri]] - {{search|Hana Matsuri}}
*[[Hanawa Matsuri]] - {{search|Hanawa Matsuri}}
*[[Spring Matsuri]] [[Haru-matsuri]] – {{search|Spring Matsuri}} {{search|Haru-matsuri}}
*[[Hi-matsuri]] - {{search|Hi-matsuri}}
*[[Hibue matsuri]] - {{search|Hibue matsuri}}
*[[Hikiyama matsuri]] - {{search|Hikiyama matsuri}}
*[[Hita Gion Festival]] - {{search|Hita Gion Festival}}
*[[Hotaru Matsuri]] - {{search|Hotaru Matsuri}}
*[[Inukko matsuri]] [[Inukko]] - {{search|Inukko matsuri}}
*[[Inuyama Festival]] - {{search|Inuyama Festival}}
*[[Inuyama matsuri]] - {{search|Inuyama matsuri}}
*[[Iwashimizu Matsuri]] [[Iwashimizu-matsuri]] – {{search|iwashimizu Matsuri}}  {{search|Iwashimizu-matsuri}}
*[[Izumo Taisha Jinzaisai]] - {{search|Izumo Taisha Jinzaisai}}
*[[Jōhana Shinmei Shrine Festival]] - {{search|Jōhana Shinmei Shrine Festival}}
*[[Joshi Matsuri]] - {{search|Joshi Matsuri}}
*[[Kaijin Matsuri]] [[Kaijin matsuri]]- {{search|Kaijin Matsuri}} / {{search|Kaijin matsuri}}
*[[Kake Odori]] - {{search|Kake Odori}}
*[[Kamakura Matsuri]] - {{search|Kamakura Matsuri}}
*[[Kamezaki Shiohi Festival]] - {{search|Kamezaki Shiohi Festival}}
*[[Kangen-sai]] [[Kangensai]] - {{search|Kangen-sai}}
*[[Kanmiso-jai]] - {{search|Kanmiso-jai}}
*[[Kanname-sai]] [[Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] - {{search|Kanname-sai}}
*[[Kanuma Imamiya Festival]] - {{search|Kanuma Imamiya Festival}}
*[[kappa tenno-sai]] - {{search|kappa tenno-sai}}
*[[Karasuyama Yamaage Festival]] - {{search|Karasuyama Yamaage Festival}}
*[[Kasa-Matsuri]] - {{search|Kasa-Matsuri}}
*[[kawagic matsuri]] - {{search|kawagic matsuri}}
*[[Kurama Fire Festival]] - {{search|Kurama Fire Festival}}
*[[Mi-kuruma-yama matsuri]] - {{search|Mi-kuruma-yama matsuri}}
*[[Nachi no hi-matsuri]] - {{search|Nachi no hi-matsuri}}
*[[Nagahama Hikiyama Festival]] - {{search|Nagahama Hikiyama Festival}}
*[[Summer Matsuri]] [[Natsu-matsuri]] – {{search|Summer Matsuri}} / {{search|Natsu-matsuri}}
*[[Nenbutsu Odori]] - {{search|Nenbutsu Odori}}
*[[Ōgaki Festival]] - {{search|Ōgaki Festival}}
*[[Sacred pillar matsuri]] - {{search|Sacred pillar matsuri}}
*[[Saidaiji Eyo]], Japanese festival - {{search|Saidaiji Eyo}}
*[[Sanzoro matsuri]] - {{search|Sanzoro matsuri}}
*[[Sawara Festival]] - {{search|Sawara Festival}}
*[[Sechi Festival]] - {{search|Sechi Festival}}
*[[Seihaku Festival]] - {{search|Seihaku Festival}}
*[[Seishoku matsuri]] - {{search|Seishoku matsuri}}
*[[Shimotsuki matsuri]] - {{search|Shimotsuki matsuri}}
*[[Spring Hoe Festival of Higoshi Shinmei Shrine]] - {{search|Spring Hoe Festival of Higoshi Shinmei Shrine}}
*[[Sunari Festival]] - {{search|Sunari Festival}}
*[[Tagata Matsuri]] - {{search|tagata matsuri}}
*[[Takaoka Mikuruma-yama Festival]] - {{search|Takaoka Mikuruma-yama Festival}}
*[[tama-matsuri]] - {{search|tama-matsuri}}
*[[Taue matsuri]], Japanese rice planting festival - {{search|Taue matsuri}}
*[[Tei Festival]] - {{search|Tei Festival}}
*[[Toka Ebisu]] - {{search|Toka Ebisu}}
*[[Tono Matsuri]] - {{search|Tono Matsuri}}
*[[Toride Shrine Festival]] - {{search|Toride Shrine Festival}}
*[[Toshi-goi no matsuri]] - {{search|Toshi-goi no matsuri}}
*[[Toyama-no-shimatsuki matsuri]] - {{search|Toyama-no-shimatsuki matsuri}}
*[[Tsuki-nami no matsuri]] - {{search|Tsuki-nami no matsuri}}
*[[Ueno Tenjin Festival]] - {{search|Ueno Tenjin Festival}}
*[[uesugi matsuri]] - {{search|uesugi matsuri}}
*[[Uozu Tatemon Festival]] - {{search|Uozu Tatemon Festival}}
*[[Yatsushiro Myoken Festival]] - {{search|Yatsushiro Myoken Festival}}
*[[You-matsuri]] - {{search|You-matsuri}}
*[[Yudate matsuri]] - {{search|Yudate matsuri}}

===Pilgrimages===
*[[Okage-Mairi]], pilgrimage - {{search|Okage-Mairi}}
*[[Schichi-Fukujin Pilgrimage]] - {{search|Schichi-Fukujin Pilgrimage}}
*[[Senja mairi]], pilgrimage - {{search|Senja mairi}}

==Temples and shrines==
*[[Ako Oishi jinja]] - {{search|Ako Oishi jinja}}
*[[Bekkaku-kampei-sha]], shrine type - {{search|Bekkaku-kampei-sha}}
*[[Bichinomiya ebusy jinja]] [[Bichinomiya ebusy Shrine]] - {{search|Bichinomiya ebusy jinja}}
*[[Chikamatsu Temple]] - {{search|Chikamatsu Temple}}
*[[Futare-san jinja]] [[Futare-san Shrine]] - {{search|Futare-san jinja}}
*[[Gassan Hongu]], shinto shrine - {{search|Gassan Hongu}}
*[[goo jinja]] [[goo Shrine]]- {{search|goo jinja}}
*[[Hōman Shrine]] - {{search|Hōman Shrine}}
*[[Hsukushima jinja]] [[Hsukushima Shrine]] - {{search|Hsukushima jinja}}
*[[Ideha Shrine]] - {{search|Ideha Shrine}}
*[[Imari Shrine]] - {{search|Imari Shrine}}
*[[Iwaki-san jinja]] [[Iwaki-san Shrine]] - {{search|Iwaki-san jinja}}
*[[Jishu Jinja]] [[Jishu Shrine]] - {{search|Jishu Jinja}}
*[[Jiun Jinja]] [[Jiun Shrine]] - {{search|Jiun Jinja}}
*[[Kamine Shrine]] - {{search|Kamine Shrine}}
*[[kashiko-dokoro]] - {{search|kashiko-dokoro}}
*[[Kasuga Jinja]], shrine - {{search|Kasuga Jinja}}
*[[Kitsumoto Shrine]] - {{search|Kitsumoto Shrine}}
*[[Kobe Nichinomiya Jinja]] [[Kobe Nichinomiya Shrine]] - {{search|kobe Nichinomiya Jinja}}
*[[Komuro Shrine]] - {{search|Komuro Shrine}}
*[[Nakashima Shrine]] - {{search|Nakashima Shrine}}
*[[Nugi Jinja]] [[Nugi Shrine]] - {{search|Nugi Jinja}}
*[[Odaka Shrine]] - {{search|Odaka Shrine}}
*[[Ōta Shrine]] - {{search|Ōta Shrine}}
*[[Shiki-nai-sha]] {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|lt=Shikinaisha}} - {{search|Shiki-nai-sha}}
*[[Sōma Nakamura Shrine]] - {{search|Sōma Nakamura Shrine}}
*[[Tanvitsu jinja]] [[Tanvitsu Shrine]] – {{search|Tanvitsu jinja}}
*[[Unotori Shrine]] - {{search|Unotori Shrine}}
*[[Yakumo Shrine]] - {{search|Yakumo Shrine}}
*[[Yasui Konpiragu Shrine]], Kyoto – {{search|Yasui Konpiragu Shrine}}

===Temple architecture===
*[[magane style]] - {{search|magane style}}
*[[Otori style]] - {{search|Otori style}}
*[[Sengen style]] - {{search|Sengen style}}

==Sects and movements==
*[[Great Mountain Sect]], [[ontake-kyo Miteke-kyo]] - {{search|Great Mountain Sect}}
*[[Hotoku movement]] - {{search|Hotoku movement}}
*[[Jikko-kyo]] - {{search|Jikko-kyo}}

*[[Tsuzoku shinto]] - {{search|Tsuzoku shinto}}

==Related laws==

==Shinto-related people==
*[[Bunji Akazawa]], Konkokyo founder - {{search|Bunji Akazawa}}
*[[Fukuba Bisei]], Meiji shinto official - {{search|Fukuba Bisei}}
*[[Goi Masahisa]], sect leader - {{search|Goi Masahisa}}
*[[Hagiwara Naneyori]], [[Hagiwara Kanetsugu]] - {{search|Hagiwara Naneyori}}
*[[Hattori Nakatsune]], Shinto scholar - {{search|Hattori Nakatsune}}
*[[Hidetschi Suzuki Guji]], Shinto Kan-Mishi priest - {{search|Hidetschi Suzuki Guji}}
*[[Hiedo-no-Ame]] or [[Hiyeda-no-Ame]], Shinto chronicler - {{search|Hiedo-no-Ame}}
*[[Kawate Bunjiro]], [[Konoo Daijin]] founder of [[Konkoyo]] - {{search|Kawate Bunjiro}}
*[[Keisai Asami]], Shinto scholar - {{search|Keisai Asami}}
*[[Kikkawa Koretari]], Shinto philosopher - {{search|Kikkawa Koretari}}
*[[Kitamura Saya]], sect founder - {{search|Kitamura Saya}}
*[[Kunteki-o-sho]], Buddhist monk - {{search|Kunteki-o-sho}}
*[[Kurozumi Munetada]], Shinto priest - {{search|kurozumi Munetada}}
*[[Masuho Zanko]], Shinto promoter - {{search|Masuho Zanko}}
*[[Miki Tokuharu]], religious leader - {{search|Miki Tokuharu}}
*[[Okuni Takamasa]], Shinto scholar - {{search|Okuni Takamasa}}
*[[Takenouchi Shikibu]], Shinto priest - {{search|Takenouchi Shikibu}}
*[[Watarai Ieyuki]], Shinto priest - {{search|watarai Ieyuki}}
*[[Yoshikawa Koretari]], [[Kikkawa Koretari]], religious leader - {{search|Kikkawa Koretari}}

''See also the [[:en:List of Shinto shrines|List of Shinto shrines]]''
